title: The Politicization of Climate Change and Polarization in the American Public’s Views of Global Warming, 2001–2010
authors: Aaron M. McCright; Riley E. Dunlap

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: International emissions agreement, not a domestic carbon or fuel tax.

inclusion_reason: Empirical Gallup survey analysis of climate-change beliefs and concern, but it does not measure acceptability of any carbon or fuel tax.
exclusion_reason: No carbon tax, CO2 tax, fuel tax, gasoline/diesel tax, or equivalent tax policy is analyzed as a public preference or support item.
